lintExempt.rationale: Re-affirmed 2026-04-15 (task #22 audit, post-v0.20.0 / post-PR #208). These phase JSONs are shipped historical execution records of PH-01 through PH-04 work; no automated runtime consumer exists (verified: zero grep hits in `server/**`, zero references in `.github/workflows/ci.yml`, zero usage in test suites, ac-lint is a pure function library that only runs on caller-supplied plans). The only voluntary consumer is `forge_lint_refresh planPath=<this-file>`, which is an audit-time operation against a specific path and would only re-surface pre-existing F-55/F-56 violations describing already-shipped work. Live drift in newly authored plans is prevented by `npm run lint` (CI-enforced via PR #208) and per-call ac-lint, not by retroactive cleanup of historical records. Original C1-bootstrap "we'll unwind later" framing superseded — exemption retained as the correct end-state for shipped artifacts. Unwind via `grep -l 2026-04-13-c1-bootstrap .ai-workspace/plans/*.json` only if a future runtime consumer is added that would load these files automatically.

stories.title: Accept three-tier document inputs and surface in brief.documentContext (REQ-09)

acceptanceCriteria.description: buildBrief accepts optional prdContent, masterPlanContent, phasePlanContent string params
When provided, document content appears in brief.documentContext as structured object (not dumped into codebaseContext)
When none are provided, brief.documentContext is omitted or null (no error)

stories.title: Implement context injection via contextFiles parameter (REQ-10)

acceptanceCriteria.description: buildBrief accepts optional contextFiles string array parameter
Contents of each existing file included in brief.injectedContext
Non-existent files are skipped with a warning (not an error)
Empty array or omitted contextFiles: no injected context, no error

stories.title: Pass through document lineage from execution plan to brief (REQ-11)

acceptanceCriteria.description: When story has lineage metadata in plan, brief.lineage contains tier and sourceId
When story has no lineage metadata, brief.lineage is omitted (no error)
Lineage is read from plan data, not inferred (pass-through only)
